rulings.Case Title: ROBERT BELARDE VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JUNE 13, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Plaintiff¿s motion to consolidate actions numbered 275919 and 276138: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
